title: Vacancy for Teacher at WhiteHat Jr

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at WhiteHat Jr
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
